description.ko: 위성 렌즈를 통해 본 지구 표면의 추상적 탐구로, 지질학적 침식과 유기적 성장 사이의 복잡한 조화를 포착합니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of Earth's surface through a satellite lens, capturing the intricate harmony between geological erosion and organic growth.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of diverse earth textures, merging arid cracked clay deserts with deep emerald mossy highlands and intricate river delta veins, cinematic lighting, top-down perspective, high contrast, 8k resolution, detailed mineral deposits and organic patterns.
